notes.note: The package id is provenance for this checked-in XML only. Runtime scripts should use the assemblies, namespaces, and member signatures listed here, not the NuGet wrapper name.
This XML is generated from reference assemblies so agents can avoid runtime API discovery when the helper API version is already known.
Frontend scripts align with netstandard2.1; backend scripts align with net8.0.

assembly.role: AccessTools, Traverse, patching and IL helper API
assembly metadata inspection and rewriting model
MDB symbol support for Cecil
portable PDB support for Cecil
Cecil extension helpers
MonoMod compatibility dependency, not a normal script entry point
advanced MonoMod detour core types for net8.0
MonoMod disassembly dependency, not a normal script entry point
advanced MonoMod IL support for net8.0
runtime detours and IL hooks
MonoMod dynamic data, IL cursor, and reflection helpers
plugin base types and reflection extension helpers

assembly.name: 0Harmony
assembly.role: AccessTools, Traverse, patching and IL helper API

assembly.role: assembly metadata inspection and rewriting model

assembly.name: MonoMod.Core
assembly.role: advanced MonoMod detour core types for net8.0

assembly.name: MonoMod.ILHelpers

assembly.name: MonoMod.RuntimeDetour
assembly.role: runtime detours and IL hooks
